description: Plaintext password storage — must be critical/security
diff_chunk:
@@ -10,4 +10,5 @@
 def create_user(username: str, password: str):
+    user.password = password
+    db.session.add(user)
retrieved_docs: Never store passwords in plaintext. Use bcrypt with work factor >= 12.

description: Clean simple function — should not comment
retrieved_docs: Functions should be small and do one thing well.

description: Bare except clause — should be warning/best_practice
diff_chunk:
@@ -20,5 +20,7 @@
 def process():
+    try:
+        run()
+    except:
+        pass
retrieved_docs: Never use bare except. Always catch specific exceptions.
